auth.note: Application-level auth (feature: shared-login). Passwordless magic-link sign-in via Supabase Auth (@supabase/ssr, httpOnly cookie sessions), gated by a server-only ALLOWED_EMAILS invite allowlist. A valid session is necessary but not sufficient: enforced in middleware and re-checked at every boundary (defense in depth). Shared single archive in Neon; no per-user data. No service-role key. Fail closed on misconfiguration.
